conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of trigonometric identities in trigonometric calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for trigonometric identities is: its form is sin²(x) + cos²(x) = 2x.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the value of this trigonometric expression when the angle x is known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
